scripts.test:e2e: ts-node scripts/invoke-test.ts --check --prompt 'Read the thread once. Call run_bash once with command `GH_TOKEN="$(github-app-token)" gh repo view "$GH_REPO" --json nameWithOwner`; it must succeed and identify the configured repository. Then use write_file to create /workspace/agentcore-smoke.txt containing exactly AgentCore smoke test passed and verify it with read_file. Reply with exactly AgentCore smoke test passed and mark done. On any failure, reply with the error and mark failed. Do not retry failed tools.'
